# SailorOps CLI Style Guide

## Colors
- Info: Ops Blue  
- Success: Signal Green  
- Warning: Amber  
- Error: Red  

## Formatting
- Use JetBrains Mono  
- Avoid ASCII art  
- Use simple dividers  
- Keep messages short and actionable  

## TUI Guidelines
- Dark navy background  
- Ops Blue highlights  
- Minimal borders  
- Smooth, subtle transitions
